fulfillment_kpis_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns fulfillment_kpis (1o9asa8)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    round(avg(case when is_on_time_delivery then 1 else 0 end), 4) as on_time_rate_pct,
    round(avg(delivery_delay_days), 1) as average_delay_days,
    round(avg(case when is_fully_delivered then 1 else 0 end), 4) as fully_delivered_rate_pct
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
) AS "inputQuery-O6"

fulfillment_kpis_length.sql_string:
---- Length fulfillment_kpis (1o9asa8)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    round(avg(case when is_on_time_delivery then 1 else 0 end), 4) as on_time_rate_pct,
    round(avg(delivery_delay_days), 1) as average_delay_days,
    round(avg(case when is_fully_delivered then 1 else 0 end), 4) as fully_delivered_rate_pct
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
) AS "inputQuery-O6")

fulfillment_kpis_data.sql_string:
---- Data fulfillment_kpis 1o9asa8
SELECT * FROM (select
    round(avg(case when is_on_time_delivery then 1 else 0 end), 4) as on_time_rate_pct,
    round(avg(delivery_delay_days), 1) as average_delay_days,
    round(avg(case when is_fully_delivered then 1 else 0 end), 4) as fully_delivered_rate_pct
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
) AS "inputQuery-O6"

fulfillment_monthly_on_time_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns fulfillment_monthly_on_time (lbj9ll)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    requested_delivery_month,
    round(avg(case when is_on_time_delivery then 1 else 0 end), 4) as on_time_rate
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
group by 1
order by 1
) AS "inputQuery-B2"

fulfillment_monthly_on_time_length.sql_string:
---- Length fulfillment_monthly_on_time (lbj9ll)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    requested_delivery_month,
    round(avg(case when is_on_time_delivery then 1 else 0 end), 4) as on_time_rate
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
group by 1
order by 1
) AS "inputQuery-B2")

fulfillment_monthly_delay_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns fulfillment_monthly_delay (1t7ea1n)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    requested_delivery_month,
    round(avg(delivery_delay_days), 2) as average_delay_days
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
group by 1
order by 1
) AS "inputQuery-aW"

    requested_delivery_month,

group by 1
order by 1
) AS "inputQuery-aW")

fulfillment_delay_buckets_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns fulfillment_delay_buckets (nndec)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    delay_bucket,
    count(*) as order_items
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
group by 1
order by order_items desc
) AS "inputQuery-di"

fulfillment_delay_buckets_length.sql_string:
---- Length fulfillment_delay_buckets (nndec)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    delay_bucket,
    count(*) as order_items
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
group by 1
order by order_items desc
) AS "inputQuery-di")

fulfillment_delay_buckets_data.sql_string:
---- Data fulfillment_delay_buckets nndec
SELECT * FROM (select
    delay_bucket,
    count(*) as order_items
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
group by 1
order by order_items desc
) AS "inputQuery-di"

fulfillment_worst_delays_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns fulfillment_worst_delays (180noyp)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    customer_name,
    material_name,
    plant_name,
    requested_delivery_date,
    actual_delivery_date,
    round(delivery_delay_days, 1) as delivery_delay_days,
    round(open_quantity, 0) as open_quantity
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
order by delivery_delay_days desc
limit 20
) AS "inputQuery-8p"

fulfillment_worst_delays_length.sql_string:
---- Length fulfillment_worst_delays (180noyp)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    customer_name,
    material_name,
    plant_name,
    requested_delivery_date,
    actual_delivery_date,
    round(delivery_delay_days, 1) as delivery_delay_days,
    round(open_quantity, 0) as open_quantity
from greenplanetmart.order_fulfillment_items
order by delivery_delay_days desc
limit 20
) AS "inputQuery-8p")
